_comment: Evolution API v2 — Day Zero Model configuration for Clínica Virtuosa CRM

instance_create._doc: Creates a new Baileys instance. syncFullHistory MUST be false — this is the Day Zero contract: the system starts from the moment of connection and ignores all prior message history.
instance_create._syncFullHistory_reason: CRÍTICO — Day Zero model. Enabling this would flood the system with history events (messaging-history.set, chats.set, contacts.set) and create spurious Contact/Session/Message rows for data that predates this CRM installation.
instance_create._readMessages_reason: We do not auto-mark messages as read; that is done explicitly by the operator UI to avoid signalling the contact prematurely.
instance_create._readStatus_reason: Status receipts (double-blue-tick) are controlled by the operator, not by the webhook pipeline.
instance_create._groupsIgnore_reason: CRM only handles 1-to-1 conversations. Group messages would create noise and incorrect Contact records.

webhook_set._doc: Configures which events are delivered to the CRM webhook. Only the three events below are subscribed. History-sync events are intentionally absent — receiving them would violate the Day Zero contract.
webhook_set._events_excluded_reason: These events carry historical data from before instance creation. Receiving any of them would violate the Day Zero contract — no data older than the instance connection timestamp should enter the CRM database.
